ayahArabic: صٓ وَٱلْقُرْءَانِ ذِى ٱلذِّكْرِ
ayahEnglish: Ṣād. By the Qur’ān containing reminder...

ayahArabic: بَلِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ فِى عِزَّةٍ وَشِقَاقٍ
ayahEnglish: But those who disbelieve are in pride and dissension.

ayahArabic: بَلِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ فِى عِزَّةٍ وَشِقَاقٍ
ayahEnglish: But those who disbelieve are in pride and dissension.

targetTranslation: in pride/might (describing the state of كَفَرُوا/those who disbelieved)
ayahArabic: بَلِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ فِى عِزَّةٍ وَشِقَاقٍ
ayahEnglish: But those who disbelieve are in pride and dissension.

ayahArabic: كَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا مِن قَبْلِهِم مِّن قَرْنٍ فَنَادَوا۟ وَّلَاتَ حِينَ مَنَاصٍ
ayahEnglish: How many a generation have We destroyed before them, and they [then] called out; but it was not a time for escape.

ayahArabic: كَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا مِن قَبْلِهِم مِّن قَرْنٍ فَنَادَوا۟ وَّلَاتَ حِينَ مَنَاصٍ
ayahEnglish: How many a generation have We destroyed before them, and they [then] called out; but it was not a time for escape.

targetTranslation: before them (referring to the previous generations mentioned in قَرْنٍ)
ayahArabic: كَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا مِن قَبْلِهِم مِّن قَرْنٍ فَنَادَوا۟ وَّلَاتَ حِينَ مَنَاصٍ
ayahEnglish: How many a generation have We destroyed before them, and they [then] called out; but it was not a time for escape.

ayahArabic: كَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا مِن قَبْلِهِم مِّن قَرْنٍ فَنَادَوا۟ وَّلَاتَ حِينَ مَنَاصٍ
ayahEnglish: How many a generation have We destroyed before them, and they [then] called out; but it was not a time for escape.

ayahArabic: كَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا مِن قَبْلِهِم مِّن قَرْنٍ فَنَادَوا۟ وَّلَاتَ حِينَ مَنَاصٍ
ayahEnglish: How many a generation have We destroyed before them, and they [then] called out; but it was not a time for escape.

targetTranslation: any place/time of escape (in this ayah: when there was no longer any escape)
ayahArabic: كَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا مِن قَبْلِهِم مِّن قَرْنٍ فَنَادَوا۟ وَّلَاتَ حِينَ مَنَاصٍ
ayahEnglish: How many a generation have We destroyed before them, and they [then] called out; but it was not a time for escape.

targetTranslation: he came to them (referring to the disbelievers mentioned later as الْكٰفِرُونَ)
ayahArabic: وَعَجِبُوٓا۟ أَن جَآءَهُم مُّنذِرٌ مِّنْهُمْ وَقَالَ ٱلْكٰفِرُونَ هٰذَا سٰحِرٌ كَذَّابٌ
ayahEnglish: And they wonder that there has come to them a warner [i.e., Prophet Muḥammad (ﷺ)] from among themselves. And the disbelievers say, "This is a magician and a liar.

ayahArabic: وَعَجِبُوٓا۟ أَن جَآءَهُم مُّنذِرٌ مِّنْهُمْ وَقَالَ ٱلْكٰفِرُونَ هٰذَا سٰحِرٌ كَذَّابٌ
ayahEnglish: And they wonder that there has come to them a warner [i.e., Prophet Muḥammad (ﷺ)] from among themselves. And the disbelievers say, "This is a magician and a liar.

ayahArabic: وَعَجِبُوٓا۟ أَن جَآءَهُم مُّنذِرٌ مِّنْهُمْ وَقَالَ ٱلْكٰفِرُونَ هٰذَا سٰحِرٌ كَذَّابٌ
ayahEnglish: And they wonder that there has come to them a warner [i.e., Prophet Muḥammad (ﷺ)] from among themselves. And the disbelievers say, "This is a magician and a liar.

ayahArabic: وَعَجِبُوٓا۟ أَن جَآءَهُم مُّنذِرٌ مِّنْهُمْ وَقَالَ ٱلْكٰفِرُونَ هٰذَا سٰحِرٌ كَذَّابٌ
ayahEnglish: And they wonder that there has come to them a warner [i.e., Prophet Muḥammad (ﷺ)] from among themselves. And the disbelievers say, "This is a magician and a liar.

targetTranslation: did he make (the gods into one god)?
ayahArabic: أَجَعَلَ ٱلْءَالِهَةَ إِلٰهًا وٰحِدًا إِنَّ هٰذَا لَشَىْءٌ عُجَابٌ
ayahEnglish: Has he made the gods [only] one God? Indeed, this is a curious thing."

ayahArabic: أَجَعَلَ ٱلْءَالِهَةَ إِلٰهًا وٰحِدًا إِنَّ هٰذَا لَشَىْءٌ عُجَابٌ
ayahEnglish: Has he made the gods [only] one God? Indeed, this is a curious thing."

ayahArabic: أَجَعَلَ ٱلْءَالِهَةَ إِلٰهًا وٰحِدًا إِنَّ هٰذَا لَشَىْءٌ عُجَابٌ
ayahEnglish: Has he made the gods [only] one God? Indeed, this is a curious thing."

ayahArabic: أَجَعَلَ ٱلْءَالِهَةَ إِلٰهًا وٰحِدًا إِنَّ هٰذَا لَشَىْءٌ عُجَابٌ
ayahEnglish: Has he made the gods [only] one God? Indeed, this is a curious thing."

ayahArabic: وَٱنطَلَقَ ٱلْمَلَأُ مِنْهُمْ أَنِ ٱمْشُوا۟ وَٱصْبِرُوا۟ عَلَىٰٓ ءَالِهَتِكُمْ إِنَّ هٰذَا لَشَىْءٌ يُرَادُ
ayahEnglish: And the eminent among them went forth, [saying], "Continue, and be patient over [the defense of] your gods. Indeed, this is a thing intended.

ayahArabic: وَٱنطَلَقَ ٱلْمَلَأُ مِنْهُمْ أَنِ ٱمْشُوا۟ وَٱصْبِرُوا۟ عَلَىٰٓ ءَالِهَتِكُمْ إِنَّ هٰذَا لَشَىْءٌ يُرَادُ
ayahEnglish: And the eminent among them went forth, [saying], "Continue, and be patient over [the defense of] your gods. Indeed, this is a thing intended.

ayahArabic: وَٱنطَلَقَ ٱلْمَلَأُ مِنْهُمْ أَنِ ٱمْشُوا۟ وَٱصْبِرُوا۟ عَلَىٰٓ ءَالِهَتِكُمْ إِنَّ هٰذَا لَشَىْءٌ يُرَادُ
ayahEnglish: And the eminent among them went forth, [saying], "Continue, and be patient over [the defense of] your gods. Indeed, this is a thing intended.

targetTranslation: we heard (referring to what was said about هٰذَا)
ayahArabic: مَا سَمِعْنَا بِهٰذَا فِى ٱلْمِلَّةِ ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ إِنْ هٰذَآ إِلَّا ٱخْتِلٰقٌ
ayahEnglish: We have not heard of this in the latest religion. This is not but a fabrication.

ayahArabic: مَا سَمِعْنَا بِهٰذَا فِى ٱلْمِلَّةِ ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ إِنْ هٰذَآ إِلَّا ٱخْتِلٰقٌ
ayahEnglish: We have not heard of this in the latest religion. This is not but a fabrication.

targetTranslation: was it sent down? (questioning the revelation of الذِّكْرُ)
ayahArabic: أَءُنزِلَ عَلَيْهِ ٱلذِّكْرُ مِنۢ بَيْنِنَا بَلْ هُمْ فِى شَكٍّ مِّن ذِكْرِى بَل لَّمَّا يَذُوقُوا۟ عَذَابِ
ayahEnglish: Has the message been revealed to him out of [all of] us?" Rather, they are in doubt about My message. Rather, they have not yet tasted My punishment.

ayahArabic: أَءُنزِلَ عَلَيْهِ ٱلذِّكْرُ مِنۢ بَيْنِنَا بَلْ هُمْ فِى شَكٍّ مِّن ذِكْرِى بَل لَّمَّا يَذُوقُوا۟ عَذَابِ
ayahEnglish: Has the message been revealed to him out of [all of] us?" Rather, they are in doubt about My message. Rather, they have not yet tasted My punishment.

ayahEnglish: Has the message been revealed to him out of [all of] us?" Rather, they are in doubt about My message. Rather, they have not yet tasted My punishment.

ayahEnglish: Has the message been revealed to him out of [all of] us?" Rather, they are in doubt about My message. Rather, they have not yet tasted My punishment.

ayahEnglish: Has the message been revealed to him out of [all of] us?" Rather, they are in doubt about My message. Rather, they have not yet tasted My punishment.

ayahArabic: أَمْ عِندَهُمْ خَزَآئِنُ رَحْمَةِ رَبِّكَ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلْوَهَّابِ
ayahEnglish: Or do they have the depositories of the mercy of your Lord, the Exalted in Might, the Bestower?

ayahArabic: أَمْ عِندَهُمْ خَزَآئِنُ رَحْمَةِ رَبِّكَ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلْوَهَّابِ
ayahEnglish: Or do they have the depositories of the mercy of your Lord, the Exalted in Might, the Bestower?

ayahEnglish: Or do they have the depositories of the mercy of your Lord, the Exalted in Might, the Bestower?

ayahArabic: أَمْ عِندَهُمْ خَزَآئِنُ رَحْمَةِ رَبِّكَ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلْوَهَّابِ
ayahEnglish: Or do they have the depositories of the mercy of your Lord, the Exalted in Might, the Bestower?

targetTranslation: ownership/dominion (subject of لَهُم - belongs to them)
ayahArabic: أَمْ لَهُم مُّلْكُ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا فَلْيَرْتَقُوا۟ فِى ٱلْأَسْبٰبِ
ayahEnglish: Or is theirs the dominion of the heavens and the earth and what is between them? Then let them ascend through [any] ways of access.

targetTranslation: between them both (referring to السَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ)
ayahArabic: أَمْ لَهُم مُّلْكُ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا فَلْيَرْتَقُوا۟ فِى ٱلْأَسْبٰبِ
ayahEnglish: Or is theirs the dominion of the heavens and the earth and what is between them? Then let them ascend through [any] ways of access.

ayahArabic: جُندٌ مَّا هُنَالِكَ مَهْزُومٌ مِّنَ ٱلْأَحْزَابِ
ayahEnglish: [They are but] soldiers [who will be] defeated there among the companies [of disbelievers].

ayahArabic: جُندٌ مَّا هُنَالِكَ مَهْزُومٌ مِّنَ ٱلْأَحْزَابِ
ayahEnglish: [They are but] soldiers [who will be] defeated there among the companies [of disbelievers].

ayahArabic: جُندٌ مَّا هُنَالِكَ مَهْزُومٌ مِّنَ ٱلْأَحْزَابِ
ayahEnglish: [They are but] soldiers [who will be] defeated there among the companies [of disbelievers].

ayahArabic: جُندٌ مَّا هُنَالِكَ مَهْزُومٌ مِّنَ ٱلْأَحْزَابِ
ayahEnglish: [They are but] soldiers [who will be] defeated there among the companies [of disbelievers].

targetTranslation: she strongly denied something as false
ayahArabic: كَذَّبَتْ قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمُ نُوحٍ وَعَادٌ وَفِرْعَوْنُ ذُو ٱلْأَوْتَادِ
ayahEnglish: The people of Noah denied before them, and [the tribe of] ʿAad and Pharaoh, the owner of stakes,

targetTranslation: before them (referring to the deniers mentioned in كَذَّبَتْ)
ayahArabic: كَذَّبَتْ قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمُ نُوحٍ وَعَادٌ وَفِرْعَوْنُ ذُو ٱلْأَوْتَادِ
ayahEnglish: The people of Noah denied before them, and [the tribe of] ʿAad and Pharaoh, the owner of stakes,

targetTranslation: people, folk (subject of كَذَّبَتْ - they denied)
ayahArabic: كَذَّبَتْ قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمُ نُوحٍ وَعَادٌ وَفِرْعَوْنُ ذُو ٱلْأَوْتَادِ
ayahEnglish: The people of Noah denied before them, and [the tribe of] ʿAad and Pharaoh, the owner of stakes,

ayahArabic: كَذَّبَتْ قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمُ نُوحٍ وَعَادٌ وَفِرْعَوْنُ ذُو ٱلْأَوْتَادِ
ayahEnglish: The people of Noah denied before them, and [the tribe of] ʿAad and Pharaoh, the owner of stakes,

ayahArabic: كَذَّبَتْ قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمُ نُوحٍ وَعَادٌ وَفِرْعَوْنُ ذُو ٱلْأَوْتَادِ
ayahEnglish: The people of Noah denied before them, and [the tribe of] ʿAad and Pharaoh, the owner of stakes,

ayahArabic: وَثَمُودُ وَقَوْمُ لُوطٍ وَأَصْحٰبُ لْـَٔيْكَةِ أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ ٱلْأَحْزَابُ
ayahEnglish: And [the tribe of] Thamūd and the people of Lot and the companions of the thicket [i.e., people of Madyan]. Those are the companies.

targetTranslation: those (pointing to something far and addressing someone)
ayahArabic: وَثَمُودُ وَقَوْمُ لُوطٍ وَأَصْحٰبُ لْـَٔيْكَةِ أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ ٱلْأَحْزَابُ
ayahEnglish: And [the tribe of] Thamūd and the people of Lot and the companions of the thicket [i.e., people of Madyan]. Those are the companies.

ayahArabic: إِن كُلٌّ إِلَّا كَذَّبَ ٱلرُّسُلَ فَحَقَّ عِقَابِ
ayahEnglish: Each of them denied the messengers, so My penalty was justified.

ayahArabic: إِن كُلٌّ إِلَّا كَذَّبَ ٱلرُّسُلَ فَحَقَّ عِقَابِ
ayahEnglish: Each of them denied the messengers, so My penalty was justified.

ayahArabic: إِن كُلٌّ إِلَّا كَذَّبَ ٱلرُّسُلَ فَحَقَّ عِقَابِ
ayahEnglish: Each of them denied the messengers, so My penalty was justified.

ayahArabic: وَمَا يَنظُرُ هٰٓؤُلَآءِ إِلَّا صَيْحَةً وٰحِدَةً مَّا لَهَا مِن فَوَاقٍ
ayahEnglish: And these [disbelievers] await not but one blast [of the Horn]; for it there will be no delay.

ayahArabic: وَمَا يَنظُرُ هٰٓؤُلَآءِ إِلَّا صَيْحَةً وٰحِدَةً مَّا لَهَا مِن فَوَاقٍ
ayahEnglish: And these [disbelievers] await not but one blast [of the Horn]; for it there will be no delay.

ayahArabic: وَمَا يَنظُرُ هٰٓؤُلَآءِ إِلَّا صَيْحَةً وٰحِدَةً مَّا لَهَا مِن فَوَاقٍ
ayahEnglish: And these [disbelievers] await not but one blast [of the Horn]; for it there will be no delay.

targetTranslation: any pause/delay (in the context of 'they will have no pause/delay')
ayahArabic: وَمَا يَنظُرُ هٰٓؤُلَآءِ إِلَّا صَيْحَةً وٰحِدَةً مَّا لَهَا مِن فَوَاقٍ
ayahEnglish: And these [disbelievers] await not but one blast [of the Horn]; for it there will be no delay.

targetTranslation: O our lord (subject of قَالُوا/they said)
ayahArabic: وَقَالُوا۟ رَبَّنَا عَجِّل لَّنَا قِطَّنَا قَبْلَ يَوْمِ ٱلْحِسَابِ
ayahEnglish: And they say, "Our Lord, hasten for us our share [of the punishment] before the Day of Account."

ayahArabic: وَقَالُوا۟ رَبَّنَا عَجِّل لَّنَا قِطَّنَا قَبْلَ يَوْمِ ٱلْحِسَابِ
ayahEnglish: And they say, "Our Lord, hasten for us our share [of the punishment] before the Day of Account."

ayahArabic: وَقَالُوا۟ رَبَّنَا عَجِّل لَّنَا قِطَّنَا قَبْلَ يَوْمِ ٱلْحِسَابِ
ayahEnglish: And they say, "Our Lord, hasten for us our share [of the punishment] before the Day of Account."

ayahArabic: وَقَالُوا۟ رَبَّنَا عَجِّل لَّنَا قِطَّنَا قَبْلَ يَوْمِ ٱلْحِسَابِ
ayahEnglish: And they say, "Our Lord, hasten for us our share [of the punishment] before the Day of Account."

ayahArabic: وَقَالُوا۟ رَبَّنَا عَجِّل لَّنَا قِطَّنَا قَبْلَ يَوْمِ ٱلْحِسَابِ
ayahEnglish: And they say, "Our Lord, hasten for us our share [of the punishment] before the Day of Account."

ayahArabic: ٱصْبِرْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَٱذْكُرْ عَبْدَنَا دَاوُۥدَ ذَا ٱلْأَيْدِ إِنَّهُۥٓ أَوَّابٌ
ayahEnglish: Be patient over what they say and remember Our servant, David, the possessor of strength; indeed, he was one who repeatedly turned back [to Allāh].

ayahArabic: ٱصْبِرْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَٱذْكُرْ عَبْدَنَا دَاوُۥدَ ذَا ٱلْأَيْدِ إِنَّهُۥٓ أَوَّابٌ
ayahEnglish: Be patient over what they say and remember Our servant, David, the possessor of strength; indeed, he was one who repeatedly turned back [to Allāh].

ayahArabic: ٱصْبِرْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَٱذْكُرْ عَبْدَنَا دَاوُۥدَ ذَا ٱلْأَيْدِ إِنَّهُۥٓ أَوَّابٌ

ayahEnglish: Be patient over what they say and remember Our servant, David, the possessor of strength; indeed, he was one who repeatedly turned back [to Allāh].

targetTranslation: We completely controlled (the mountains mentioned in ٱلْجِبَالَ)
ayahArabic: إِنَّا سَخَّرْنَا ٱلْجِبَالَ مَعَهُۥ يُسَبِّحْنَ بِٱلْعَشِىِّ وَٱلْإِشْرَاقِ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We subjected the mountains [to praise] with him, exalting [Allāh] in the [late] afternoon and [after] sunrise.

targetTranslation: with him (connected to يُسَبِّحْنَ - they glorify)

ayahEnglish: Indeed, We subjected the mountains [to praise] with him, exalting [Allāh] in the [late] afternoon and [after] sunrise.

targetTranslation: gathered (feminine, as a state/description of الطير)
ayahArabic: وَٱلطَّيْرَ مَحْشُورَةً كُلٌّ لَّهُۥٓ أَوَّابٌ
ayahEnglish: And the birds were assembled, all with him repeating [praises].

ayahArabic: وَٱلطَّيْرَ مَحْشُورَةً كُلٌّ لَّهُۥٓ أَوَّابٌ

ayahArabic: وَشَدَدْنَا مُلْكَهُۥ وَءَاتَيْنٰهُ ٱلْحِكْمَةَ وَفَصْلَ ٱلْخِطَابِ
ayahEnglish: And We strengthened his kingdom and gave him wisdom and discernment in speech.

ayahArabic: وَهَلْ أَتَىٰكَ نَبَؤُا۟ ٱلْخَصْمِ إِذْ تَسَوَّرُوا۟ ٱلْمِحْرَابَ
ayahEnglish: And has there come to you the news of the adversaries, when they climbed over the wall of [his] prayer chamber -

ayahArabic: وَهَلْ أَتَىٰكَ نَبَؤُا۟ ٱلْخَصْمِ إِذْ تَسَوَّرُوا۟ ٱلْمِحْرَابَ

ayahEnglish: And has there come to you the news of the adversaries, when they climbed over the wall of [his] prayer chamber -

ayahArabic: إِذْ دَخَلُوا۟ عَلَىٰ دَاوُۥدَ فَفَزِعَ مِنْهُمْ قَالُوا۟ لَا تَخَفْ خَصْمَانِ بَغَىٰ بَعْضُنَا عَلَىٰ بَعْضٍ فَٱحْكُم بَيْنَنَا بِٱلْحَقِّ وَلَا تُشْطِطْ وَٱهْدِنَآ إِلَىٰ سَوَآءِ ٱلصِّرٰطِ
ayahEnglish: When they entered upon David and he was alarmed by them? They said, "Fear not. [We are] two adversaries, one of whom has wronged the other, so judge between us with truth and do not exceed [it] and guide us to the sound path.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ هٰذَآ أَخِى لَهُۥ تِسْعٌ وَتِسْعُونَ نَعْجَةً وَلِىَ نَعْجَةٌ وٰحِدَةٌ فَقَالَ أَكْفِلْنِيهَا وَعَزَّنِى فِى ٱلْخِطَابِ
ayahEnglish: Indeed this, my brother, has ninety-nine ewes, and I have one ewe; so he said, 'Entrust her to me,' and he overpowered me in speech."

ayahArabic: قَالَ لَقَدْ ظَلَمَكَ بِسُؤَالِ نَعْجَتِكَ إِلَىٰ نِعَاجِهِۦ وَإِنَّ كَثِيرًا مِّنَ ٱلْخُلَطَآءِ لَيَبْغِى بَعْضُهُمْ عَلَىٰ بَعْضٍ إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّالِحٰتِ وَقَلِيلٌ مَّا هُمْ وَظَنَّ دَاوُۥدُ أَنَّمَا فَتَنَّاهُ فَٱسْتَغْفَرَ رَبَّهُۥ وَخَرَّ رَاكِعًا وَأَنَابَ
ayahEnglish: [David] said, "He has certainly wronged you in demanding your ewe [in addition] to his ewes. And indeed, many associates oppress one another, except for those who believe and do righteous deeds - and few are they." And David became certain that We had tried him, and he asked forgiveness of his Lord and fell down bowing [in prostration] and turned in repentance [to Allāh].

targetTranslation: he wronged you (referring to one of two disputants speaking to داود)

ayahArabic: يٰدَاوُۥدُ إِنَّا جَعَلْنٰكَ خَلِيفَةً فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ فَٱحْكُم بَيْنَ ٱلنَّاسِ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَلَا تَتَّبِعِ ٱلْهَوَىٰ فَيُضِلَّكَ عَن سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يَضِلُّونَ عَن سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ لَهُمْ عَذَابٌ شَدِيدٌۢ بِمَا نَسُوا۟ يَوْمَ ٱلْحِسَابِ
ayahEnglish: [We said], "O David, indeed We have made you a successor upon the earth, so judge between the people in truth and do not follow [your own] desire, as it will lead you astray from the way of Allāh." Indeed, those who go astray from the way of Allāh will have a severe punishment for having forgotten the Day of Account.

ayahArabic: وَمَا خَلَقْنَا ٱلسَّمَآءَ وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا بٰطِلًا ذٰلِكَ ظَنُّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ فَوَيْلٌ لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلنَّارِ
ayahEnglish: And We did not create the heaven and the earth and that between them aimlessly. That is the assumption of those who disbelieve, so woe to those who disbelieve from the Fire.

targetTranslation: we make/set (addressing the disbelievers' assumption in أَمْ)
ayahArabic: أَمْ نَجْعَلُ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّالِحٰتِ كَٱلْمُفْسِدِينَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ أَمْ نَجْعَلُ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ كَٱلْفُجَّارِ
ayahEnglish: Or should We treat those who believe and do righteous deeds like corrupters in the land? Or should We treat those who fear Allāh like the wicked?

ayahArabic: كِتٰبٌ أَنزَلْنٰهُ إِلَيْكَ مُبٰرَكٌ لِّيَدَّبَّرُوٓا۟ ءَايٰتِهِۦ وَلِيَتَذَكَّرَ أُو۟لُوا۟ ٱلْأَلْبٰبِ
ayahEnglish: [This is] a blessed Book which We have revealed to you, [O Muḥammad], that they might reflect upon its verses and that those of understanding would be reminded.

targetTranslation: we sent it down (referring to كِتٰبٌ - the book)
ayahArabic: كِتٰبٌ أَنزَلْنٰهُ إِلَيْكَ مُبٰرَكٌ لِّيَدَّبَّرُوٓا۟ ءَايٰتِهِۦ وَلِيَتَذَكَّرَ أُو۟لُوا۟ ٱلْأَلْبٰبِ

ayahArabic: كِتٰبٌ أَنزَلْنٰهُ إِلَيْكَ مُبٰرَكٌ لِّيَدَّبَّرُوٓا۟ ءَايٰتِهِۦ وَلِيَتَذَكَّرَ أُو۟لُوا۟ ٱلْأَلْبٰبِ

targetTranslation: His signs, His verses (being reflected upon in يَدَّبَّرُوا)
ayahArabic: كِتٰبٌ أَنزَلْنٰهُ إِلَيْكَ مُبٰرَكٌ لِّيَدَّبَّرُوٓا۟ ءَايٰتِهِۦ وَلِيَتَذَكَّرَ أُو۟لُوا۟ ٱلْأَلْبٰبِ

ayahArabic: وَوَهَبْنَا لِدَاوُۥدَ سُلَيْمٰنَ نِعْمَ ٱلْعَبْدُ إِنَّهُۥٓ أَوَّابٌ
ayahEnglish: And to David We gave Solomon. An excellent servant, indeed he was one repeatedly turning back [to Allāh].

ayahArabic: وَوَهَبْنَا لِدَاوُۥدَ سُلَيْمٰنَ نِعْمَ ٱلْعَبْدُ إِنَّهُۥٓ أَوَّابٌ
ayahEnglish: And to David We gave Solomon. An excellent servant, indeed he was one repeatedly turning back [to Allāh].

ayahArabic: وَوَهَبْنَا لِدَاوُۥدَ سُلَيْمٰنَ نِعْمَ ٱلْعَبْدُ إِنَّهُۥٓ أَوَّابٌ
ayahEnglish: And to David We gave Solomon. An excellent servant, indeed he was one repeatedly turning back [to Allāh].

targetTranslation: when (referring to a past event: عُرِضَ - was displayed)
ayahArabic: إِذْ عُرِضَ عَلَيْهِ بِٱلْعَشِىِّ ٱلصَّافِنٰتُ ٱلْجِيَادُ
ayahEnglish: [Mention] when there were exhibited before him in the afternoon the poised [standing] racehorses.

targetTranslation: it was displayed (subject of the sentence)
ayahArabic: إِذْ عُرِضَ عَلَيْهِ بِٱلْعَشِىِّ ٱلصَّافِنٰتُ ٱلْجِيَادُ
ayahEnglish: [Mention] when there were exhibited before him in the afternoon the poised [standing] racehorses.

targetTranslation: I preferred (حُبَّ ٱلْخَيْرِ - the love of good things)
ayahArabic: فَقَالَ إِنِّىٓ أَحْبَبْتُ حُبَّ ٱلْخَيْرِ عَن ذِكْرِ رَبِّى حَتَّىٰ تَوَارَتْ بِٱلْحِجَابِ
ayahEnglish: And he said, "Indeed, I gave preference to the love of good [things] over the remembrance of my Lord until it [i.e., the sun] disappeared into the curtain [of darkness]."

ayahArabic: فَقَالَ إِنِّىٓ أَحْبَبْتُ حُبَّ ٱلْخَيْرِ عَن ذِكْرِ رَبِّى حَتَّىٰ تَوَارَتْ بِٱلْحِجَابِ
ayahEnglish: And he said, "Indeed, I gave preference to the love of good [things] over the remembrance of my Lord until it [i.e., the sun] disappeared into the curtain [of darkness]."

ayahArabic: فَقَالَ إِنِّىٓ أَحْبَبْتُ حُبَّ ٱلْخَيْرِ عَن ذِكْرِ رَبِّى حَتَّىٰ تَوَارَتْ بِٱلْحِجَابِ
ayahEnglish: And he said, "Indeed, I gave preference to the love of good [things] over the remembrance of my Lord until it [i.e., the sun] disappeared into the curtain [of darkness]."

ayahArabic: فَقَالَ إِنِّىٓ أَحْبَبْتُ حُبَّ ٱلْخَيْرِ عَن ذِكْرِ رَبِّى حَتَّىٰ تَوَارَتْ بِٱلْحِجَابِ
ayahEnglish: And he said, "Indeed, I gave preference to the love of good [things] over the remembrance of my Lord until it [i.e., the sun] disappeared into the curtain [of darkness]."

ayahArabic: فَقَالَ إِنِّىٓ أَحْبَبْتُ حُبَّ ٱلْخَيْرِ عَن ذِكْرِ رَبِّى حَتَّىٰ تَوَارَتْ بِٱلْحِجَابِ
ayahEnglish: And he said, "Indeed, I gave preference to the love of good [things] over the remembrance of my Lord until it [i.e., the sun] disappeared into the curtain [of darkness]."

ayahArabic: رُدُّوهَا عَلَىَّ فَطَفِقَ مَسْحًۢا بِٱلسُّوقِ وَٱلْأَعْنَاقِ
ayahEnglish: [He said], "Return them to me," and set about striking [their] legs and necks.

ayahArabic: رُدُّوهَا عَلَىَّ فَطَفِقَ مَسْحًۢا بِٱلسُّوقِ وَٱلْأَعْنَاقِ
ayahEnglish: [He said], "Return them to me," and set about striking [their] legs and necks.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ فَتَنَّا سُلَيْمٰنَ وَأَلْقَيْنَا عَلَىٰ كُرْسِيِّهِۦ جَسَدًا ثُمَّ أَنَابَ
ayahEnglish: And We certainly tried Solomon and placed on his throne a body; then he returned.

targetTranslation: Solomon (the prophet, as the object being tested)
ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ فَتَنَّا سُلَيْمٰنَ وَأَلْقَيْنَا عَلَىٰ كُرْسِيِّهِۦ جَسَدًا ثُمَّ أَنَابَ
ayahEnglish: And We certainly tried Solomon and placed on his throne a body; then he returned.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ فَتَنَّا سُلَيْمٰنَ وَأَلْقَيْنَا عَلَىٰ كُرْسِيِّهِۦ جَسَدًا ثُمَّ أَنَابَ
ayahEnglish: And We certainly tried Solomon and placed on his throne a body; then he returned.

targetTranslation: a body (object of أَلْقَيْنَا - we placed)
ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ فَتَنَّا سُلَيْمٰنَ وَأَلْقَيْنَا عَلَىٰ كُرْسِيِّهِۦ جَسَدًا ثُمَّ أَنَابَ
ayahEnglish: And We certainly tried Solomon and placed on his throne a body; then he returned.

targetTranslation: he turned back (to Allah in repentance)
ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ فَتَنَّا سُلَيْمٰنَ وَأَلْقَيْنَا عَلَىٰ كُرْسِيِّهِۦ جَسَدًا ثُمَّ أَنَابَ
ayahEnglish: And We certainly tried Solomon and placed on his throne a body; then he returned.

ayahArabic: قَالَ رَبِّ ٱغْفِرْ لِى وَهَبْ لِى مُلْكًا لَّا يَنۢبَغِى لِأَحَدٍ مِّنۢ بَعْدِىٓ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ ٱلْوَهَّابُ
ayahEnglish: He said, "My Lord, forgive me and grant me a kingdom such as will not belong to anyone after me. Indeed, You are the Bestower."

ayahArabic: قَالَ رَبِّ ٱغْفِرْ لِى وَهَبْ لِى مُلْكًا لَّا يَنۢبَغِى لِأَحَدٍ مِّنۢ بَعْدِىٓ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ ٱلْوَهَّابُ
ayahEnglish: He said, "My Lord, forgive me and grant me a kingdom such as will not belong to anyone after me. Indeed, You are the Bestower."

ayahArabic: قَالَ رَبِّ ٱغْفِرْ لِى وَهَبْ لِى مُلْكًا لَّا يَنۢبَغِى لِأَحَدٍ مِّنۢ بَعْدِىٓ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ ٱلْوَهَّابُ
ayahEnglish: He said, "My Lord, forgive me and grant me a kingdom such as will not belong to anyone after me. Indeed, You are the Bestower."

ayahArabic: قَالَ رَبِّ ٱغْفِرْ لِى وَهَبْ لِى مُلْكًا لَّا يَنۢبَغِى لِأَحَدٍ مِّنۢ بَعْدِىٓ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ ٱلْوَهَّابُ
ayahEnglish: He said, "My Lord, forgive me and grant me a kingdom such as will not belong to anyone after me. Indeed, You are the Bestower."

ayahArabic: قَالَ رَبِّ ٱغْفِرْ لِى وَهَبْ لِى مُلْكًا لَّا يَنۢبَغِى لِأَحَدٍ مِّنۢ بَعْدِىٓ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ ٱلْوَهَّابُ
ayahEnglish: He said, "My Lord, forgive me and grant me a kingdom such as will not belong to anyone after me. Indeed, You are the Bestower."

targetTranslation: after me (possessed by me in لِأَحَدٍ مِّنۢ بَعْدِىٓ)
ayahArabic: قَالَ رَبِّ ٱغْفِرْ لِى وَهَبْ لِى مُلْكًا لَّا يَنۢبَغِى لِأَحَدٍ مِّنۢ بَعْدِىٓ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ ٱلْوَهَّابُ
ayahEnglish: He said, "My Lord, forgive me and grant me a kingdom such as will not belong to anyone after me. Indeed, You are the Bestower."

ayahArabic: قَالَ رَبِّ ٱغْفِرْ لِى وَهَبْ لِى مُلْكًا لَّا يَنۢبَغِى لِأَحَدٍ مِّنۢ بَعْدِىٓ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ ٱلْوَهَّابُ
ayahEnglish: He said, "My Lord, forgive me and grant me a kingdom such as will not belong to anyone after me. Indeed, You are the Bestower."

ayahArabic: فَسَخَّرْنَا لَهُ ٱلرِّيحَ تَجْرِى بِأَمْرِهِۦ رُخَآءً حَيْثُ أَصَابَ
ayahEnglish: So We subjected to him the wind blowing by his command, gently, wherever he directed,

ayahArabic: فَسَخَّرْنَا لَهُ ٱلرِّيحَ تَجْرِى بِأَمْرِهِۦ رُخَآءً حَيْثُ أَصَابَ
ayahEnglish: So We subjected to him the wind blowing by his command, gently, wherever he directed,

ayahArabic: فَسَخَّرْنَا لَهُ ٱلرِّيحَ تَجْرِى بِأَمْرِهِۦ رُخَآءً حَيْثُ أَصَابَ
ayahEnglish: So We subjected to him the wind blowing by his command, gently, wherever he directed,

ayahArabic: فَسَخَّرْنَا لَهُ ٱلرِّيحَ تَجْرِى بِأَمْرِهِۦ رُخَآءً حَيْثُ أَصَابَ
ayahEnglish: So We subjected to him the wind blowing by his command, gently, wherever he directed,

targetTranslation: every, all (describing what is being acted upon in this ayah)
ayahArabic: وَٱلشَّيٰطِينَ كُلَّ بَنَّآءٍ وَغَوَّاصٍ
ayahEnglish: And [also] the devils [of jinn] - every builder and diver.

targetTranslation: a master builder (one of many given to سليمن)
ayahArabic: وَٱلشَّيٰطِينَ كُلَّ بَنَّآءٍ وَغَوَّاصٍ
ayahEnglish: And [also] the devils [of jinn] - every builder and diver.

targetTranslation: those who are bound/chained (multiple males, connected to آخَرِينَ - others)
ayahArabic: وَءَاخَرِينَ مُقَرَّنِينَ فِى ٱلْأَصْفَادِ
ayahEnglish: And others bound together in irons.

ayahArabic: هٰذَا عَطَآؤُنَا فَٱمْنُنْ أَوْ أَمْسِكْ بِغَيْرِ حِسَابٍ
ayahEnglish: [We said], "This is Our gift, so grant or withhold without account."

ayahArabic: هٰذَا عَطَآؤُنَا فَٱمْنُنْ أَوْ أَمْسِكْ بِغَيْرِ حِسَابٍ
ayahEnglish: [We said], "This is Our gift, so grant or withhold without account."

ayahArabic: هٰذَا عَطَآؤُنَا فَٱمْنُنْ أَوْ أَمْسِكْ بِغَيْرِ حِسَابٍ
ayahEnglish: [We said], "This is Our gift, so grant or withhold without account."

targetTranslation: with us (possessed by له - for him)
ayahArabic: وَإِنَّ لَهُۥ عِندَنَا لَزُلْفَىٰ وَحُسْنَ مَـَٔابٍ
ayahEnglish: And indeed, for him is nearness to Us and a good place of return.

targetTranslation: a place of return (in the context of وَحُسْنَ - and goodness of)
ayahArabic: وَإِنَّ لَهُۥ عِندَنَا لَزُلْفَىٰ وَحُسْنَ مَـَٔابٍ
ayahEnglish: And indeed, for him is nearness to Us and a good place of return.

ayahArabic: وَٱذْكُرْ عَبْدَنَآ أَيُّوبَ إِذْ نَادَىٰ رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنِّى مَسَّنِىَ ٱلشَّيْطٰنُ بِنُصْبٍ وَعَذَابٍ
ayahEnglish: And remember Our servant Job, when he called to his Lord, "Indeed, Satan has touched me with hardship and torment."

ayahArabic: وَٱذْكُرْ عَبْدَنَآ أَيُّوبَ إِذْ نَادَىٰ رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنِّى مَسَّنِىَ ٱلشَّيْطٰنُ بِنُصْبٍ وَعَذَابٍ
ayahEnglish: And remember Our servant Job, when he called to his Lord, "Indeed, Satan has touched me with hardship and torment."

ayahArabic: وَٱذْكُرْ عَبْدَنَآ أَيُّوبَ إِذْ نَادَىٰ رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنِّى مَسَّنِىَ ٱلشَّيْطٰنُ بِنُصْبٍ وَعَذَابٍ
ayahEnglish: And remember Our servant Job, when he called to his Lord, "Indeed, Satan has touched me with hardship and torment."

ayahArabic: وَٱذْكُرْ عَبْدَنَآ أَيُّوبَ إِذْ نَادَىٰ رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنِّى مَسَّنِىَ ٱلشَّيْطٰنُ بِنُصْبٍ وَعَذَابٍ
ayahEnglish: And remember Our servant Job, when he called to his Lord, "Indeed, Satan has touched me with hardship and torment."

ayahArabic: وَٱذْكُرْ عَبْدَنَآ أَيُّوبَ إِذْ نَادَىٰ رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنِّى مَسَّنِىَ ٱلشَّيْطٰنُ بِنُصْبٍ وَعَذَابٍ
ayahEnglish: And remember Our servant Job, when he called to his Lord, "Indeed, Satan has touched me with hardship and torment."

ayahArabic: وَٱذْكُرْ عَبْدَنَآ أَيُّوبَ إِذْ نَادَىٰ رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنِّى مَسَّنِىَ ٱلشَّيْطٰنُ بِنُصْبٍ وَعَذَابٍ
ayahEnglish: And remember Our servant Job, when he called to his Lord, "Indeed, Satan has touched me with hardship and torment."

ayahArabic: ٱرْكُضْ بِرِجْلِكَ هٰذَا مُغْتَسَلٌۢ بَارِدٌ وَشَرَابٌ
ayahEnglish: [So he was told], "Strike [the ground] with your foot; this is a [spring for a] cool bath and drink."

ayahArabic: ٱرْكُضْ بِرِجْلِكَ هٰذَا مُغْتَسَلٌۢ بَارِدٌ وَشَرَابٌ
ayahEnglish: [So he was told], "Strike [the ground] with your foot; this is a [spring for a] cool bath and drink."

ayahArabic: ٱرْكُضْ بِرِجْلِكَ هٰذَا مُغْتَسَلٌۢ بَارِدٌ وَشَرَابٌ
ayahEnglish: [So he was told], "Strike [the ground] with your foot; this is a [spring for a] cool bath and drink."

ayahArabic: وَوَهَبْنَا لَهُۥٓ أَهْلَهُۥ وَمِثْلَهُم مَّعَهُمْ رَحْمَةً مِّنَّا وَذِكْرَىٰ لِأُو۟لِى ٱلْأَلْبٰبِ
ayahEnglish: And We granted him his family and a like [number] with them as mercy from Us and a reminder for those of understanding.

ayahArabic: وَوَهَبْنَا لَهُۥٓ أَهْلَهُۥ وَمِثْلَهُم مَّعَهُمْ رَحْمَةً مِّنَّا وَذِكْرَىٰ لِأُو۟لِى ٱلْأَلْبٰبِ
ayahEnglish: And We granted him his family and a like [number] with them as mercy from Us and a reminder for those of understanding.

targetTranslation: mercy (as a gift from مِّنَّا - from Us)
ayahArabic: وَوَهَبْنَا لَهُۥٓ أَهْلَهُۥ وَمِثْلَهُم مَّعَهُمْ رَحْمَةً مِّنَّا وَذِكْرَىٰ لِأُو۟لِى ٱلْأَلْبٰبِ
ayahEnglish: And We granted him his family and a like [number] with them as mercy from Us and a reminder for those of understanding.

ayahArabic: وَخُذْ بِيَدِكَ ضِغْثًا فَٱضْرِب بِّهِۦ وَلَا تَحْنَثْ إِنَّا وَجَدْنٰهُ صَابِرًا نِّعْمَ ٱلْعَبْدُ إِنَّهُۥٓ أَوَّابٌ
ayahEnglish: [We said], "And take in your hand a bunch [of grass] and strike with it and do not break your oath." Indeed, We found him patient, an excellent servant. Indeed, he was one repeatedly turning back [to Allāh].

targetTranslation: do not break (an oath) (negative command in وَلَا تَحْنَثْ)
ayahArabic: وَخُذْ بِيَدِكَ ضِغْثًا فَٱضْرِب بِّهِۦ وَلَا تَحْنَثْ إِنَّا وَجَدْنٰهُ صَابِرًا نِّعْمَ ٱلْعَبْدُ إِنَّهُۥٓ أَوَّابٌ
ayahEnglish: [We said], "And take in your hand a bunch [of grass] and strike with it and do not break your oath." Indeed, We found him patient, an excellent servant. Indeed, he was one repeatedly turning back [to Allāh].

ayahArabic: وَخُذْ بِيَدِكَ ضِغْثًا فَٱضْرِب بِّهِۦ وَلَا تَحْنَثْ إِنَّا وَجَدْنٰهُ صَابِرًا نِّعْمَ ٱلْعَبْدُ إِنَّهُۥٓ أَوَّابٌ
ayahEnglish: [We said], "And take in your hand a bunch [of grass] and strike with it and do not break your oath." Indeed, We found him patient, an excellent servant. Indeed, he was one repeatedly turning back [to Allāh].

ayahArabic: وَخُذْ بِيَدِكَ ضِغْثًا فَٱضْرِب بِّهِۦ وَلَا تَحْنَثْ إِنَّا وَجَدْنٰهُ صَابِرًا نِّعْمَ ٱلْعَبْدُ إِنَّهُۥٓ أَوَّابٌ
ayahEnglish: [We said], "And take in your hand a bunch [of grass] and strike with it and do not break your oath." Indeed, We found him patient, an excellent servant. Indeed, he was one repeatedly turning back [to Allāh].

ayahArabic: وَخُذْ بِيَدِكَ ضِغْثًا فَٱضْرِب بِّهِۦ وَلَا تَحْنَثْ إِنَّا وَجَدْنٰهُ صَابِرًا نِّعْمَ ٱلْعَبْدُ إِنَّهُۥٓ أَوَّابٌ
ayahEnglish: [We said], "And take in your hand a bunch [of grass] and strike with it and do not break your oath." Indeed, We found him patient, an excellent servant. Indeed, he was one repeatedly turning back [to Allāh].

targetTranslation: one who constantly returns (in repentance) (as subject)
ayahArabic: وَخُذْ بِيَدِكَ ضِغْثًا فَٱضْرِب بِّهِۦ وَلَا تَحْنَثْ إِنَّا وَجَدْنٰهُ صَابِرًا نِّعْمَ ٱلْعَبْدُ إِنَّهُۥٓ أَوَّابٌ
ayahEnglish: [We said], "And take in your hand a bunch [of grass] and strike with it and do not break your oath." Indeed, We found him patient, an excellent servant. Indeed, he was one repeatedly turning back [to Allāh].

ayahArabic: وَٱذْكُرْ عِبٰدَنَآ إِبْرٰهِيمَ وَإِسْحٰقَ وَيَعْقُوبَ أُو۟لِى ٱلْأَيْدِى وَٱلْأَبْصٰرِ
ayahEnglish: And remember Our servants, Abraham, Isaac and Jacob - those of strength and [religious] vision.

ayahArabic: وَٱذْكُرْ عِبٰدَنَآ إِبْرٰهِيمَ وَإِسْحٰقَ وَيَعْقُوبَ أُو۟لِى ٱلْأَيْدِى وَٱلْأَبْصٰرِ
ayahEnglish: And remember Our servants, Abraham, Isaac and Jacob - those of strength and [religious] vision.

ayahArabic: وَٱذْكُرْ عِبٰدَنَآ إِبْرٰهِيمَ وَإِسْحٰقَ وَيَعْقُوبَ أُو۟لِى ٱلْأَيْدِى وَٱلْأَبْصٰرِ
ayahEnglish: And remember Our servants, Abraham, Isaac and Jacob - those of strength and [religious] vision.

targetTranslation: we purified them (referring to the chosen ones mentioned in this passage)
ayahArabic: إِنَّآ أَخْلَصْنٰهُم بِخَالِصَةٍ ذِكْرَى ٱلدَّارِ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We chose them for an exclusive quality: remembrance of the home [of the Hereafter].

ayahArabic: إِنَّآ أَخْلَصْنٰهُم بِخَالِصَةٍ ذِكْرَى ٱلدَّارِ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We chose them for an exclusive quality: remembrance of the home [of the Hereafter].

targetTranslation: with us (in the phrase 'they are with us')
ayahArabic: وَإِنَّهُمْ عِندَنَا لَمِنَ ٱلْمُصْطَفَيْنَ ٱلْأَخْيَارِ
ayahEnglish: And indeed they are, to Us, among the chosen and outstanding.

ayahArabic: وَٱذْكُرْ إِسْمٰعِيلَ وَٱلْيَسَعَ وَذَا ٱلْكِفْلِ وَكُلٌّ مِّنَ ٱلْأَخْيَارِ
ayahEnglish: And remember Ishmael, Elisha and Dhul-Kifl, and all are among the outstanding.

ayahArabic: هٰذَا ذِكْرٌ وَإِنَّ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ لَحُسْنَ مَـَٔابٍ
ayahEnglish: This is a reminder. And indeed, for the righteous is a good place of return -

targetTranslation: a place of return (possessed by حُسْنَ)
ayahArabic: هٰذَا ذِكْرٌ وَإِنَّ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ لَحُسْنَ مَـَٔابٍ
ayahEnglish: This is a reminder. And indeed, for the righteous is a good place of return -

ayahArabic: جَنَّاتِ عَدْنٍ مُّفَتَّحَةً لَّهُمُ ٱلْأَبْوٰبُ
ayahEnglish: Gardens of perpetual residence, whose doors will be opened to them.

ayahArabic: جَنَّاتِ عَدْنٍ مُّفَتَّحَةً لَّهُمُ ٱلْأَبْوٰبُ
ayahEnglish: Gardens of perpetual residence, whose doors will be opened to them.

ayahArabic: جَنَّاتِ عَدْنٍ مُّفَتَّحَةً لَّهُمُ ٱلْأَبْوٰبُ
ayahEnglish: Gardens of perpetual residence, whose doors will be opened to them.

targetTranslation: ones who are reclining comfortably (refers to the blessed people in paradise)

ayahEnglish: Reclining within them, they will call therein for abundant fruit and drink.

targetTranslation: they call/are calling (referring to the blessed people in Paradise)

ayahEnglish: Reclining within them, they will call therein for abundant fruit and drink.

ayahArabic: مُتَّكِـِٔينَ فِيهَا يَدْعُونَ فِيهَا بِفٰكِهَةٍ كَثِيرَةٍ وَشَرَابٍ
ayahEnglish: Reclining within them, they will call therein for abundant fruit and drink.

targetTranslation: females who limit their gaze (subject of أَتْرَابٌ)
ayahArabic: وَعِندَهُمْ قٰصِرٰتُ ٱلطَّرْفِ أَتْرَابٌ
ayahEnglish: And with them will be women limiting [their] glances and of equal age.

ayahArabic: وَعِندَهُمْ قٰصِرٰتُ ٱلطَّرْفِ أَتْرَابٌ

ayahArabic: هٰذَا مَا تُوعَدُونَ لِيَوْمِ ٱلْحِسَابِ
ayahEnglish: This is what you, [the righteous], are promised for the Day of Account.

targetTranslation: you (all) are promised (what is mentioned before in هٰذَا مَا)

ayahEnglish: This is what you, [the righteous], are promised for the Day of Account.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ هٰذَا لَرِزْقُنَا مَا لَهُۥ مِن نَّفَادٍ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, this is Our provision; for it there is no depletion.

targetTranslation: a place of return (owned by شَرَّ)
ayahArabic: هٰذَا وَإِنَّ لِلطَّاغِينَ لَشَرَّ مَـَٔابٍ
ayahEnglish: This [is so]. But indeed, for the transgressors is an evil place of return -

targetTranslation: Hell (as the object being entered in يَصْلَوْنَهَا - they will enter it)

ayahEnglish: Hell, which they will [enter to] burn, and wretched is the resting place.

targetTranslation: they enter/burn in it (referring to جَهَنَّمَ)

ayahEnglish: Hell, which they will [enter to] burn, and wretched is the resting place.

ayahArabic: هٰذَا فَلْيَذُوقُوهُ حَمِيمٌ وَغَسَّاقٌ
ayahEnglish: This - so let them taste it - is scalding water and [foul] purulence.

ayahArabic: وَءَاخَرُ مِن شَكْلِهِۦٓ أَزْوٰجٌ
ayahEnglish: And other [punishments] of its type [in various] kinds.

ayahArabic: وَءَاخَرُ مِن شَكْلِهِۦٓ أَزْوٰجٌ

ayahEnglish: [So mention] when your Lord said to the angels, "Indeed, I am going to create a human being from clay.

targetTranslation: I shaped him perfectly (with special care)
ayahArabic: فَإِذَا سَوَّيْتُهُۥ وَنَفَخْتُ فِيهِ مِن رُّوحِى فَقَعُوا۟ لَهُۥ سٰجِدِينَ
ayahEnglish: So when I have proportioned him and breathed into him of My [created] soul, then fall down to him in prostration."

ayahArabic: فَإِذَا سَوَّيْتُهُۥ وَنَفَخْتُ فِيهِ مِن رُّوحِى فَقَعُوا۟ لَهُۥ سٰجِدِينَ
ayahEnglish: So when I have proportioned him and breathed into him of My [created] soul, then fall down to him in prostration."

ayahArabic: فَإِذَا سَوَّيْتُهُۥ وَنَفَخْتُ فِيهِ مِن رُّوحِى فَقَعُوا۟ لَهُۥ سٰجِدِينَ
ayahEnglish: So when I have proportioned him and breathed into him of My [created] soul, then fall down to him in prostration."

ayahArabic: فَسَجَدَ ٱلْمَلٰٓئِكَةُ كُلُّهُمْ أَجْمَعُونَ
ayahEnglish: So the angels prostrated - all of them entirely,

ayahArabic: فَسَجَدَ ٱلْمَلٰٓئِكَةُ كُلُّهُمْ أَجْمَعُونَ
ayahEnglish: So the angels prostrated - all of them entirely,

targetTranslation: Iblis (as the object being excepted by إِلَّآ)
ayahArabic: إِلَّآ إِبْلِيسَ ٱسْتَكْبَرَ وَكَانَ مِنَ ٱلْكٰفِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: Except Iblees; he was arrogant and became among the disbelievers.

ayahArabic: إِلَّآ إِبْلِيسَ ٱسْتَكْبَرَ وَكَانَ مِنَ ٱلْكٰفِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: Except Iblees; he was arrogant and became among the disbelievers.

ayahArabic: قَالَ يٰٓإِبْلِيسُ مَا مَنَعَكَ أَن تَسْجُدَ لِمَا خَلَقْتُ بِيَدَىَّ أَسْتَكْبَرْتَ أَمْ كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلْعَالِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "O Iblees, what prevented you from prostrating to that which I created with My hands? Were you arrogant [then], or were you [already] among the haughty?"

ayahArabic: قَالَ يٰٓإِبْلِيسُ مَا مَنَعَكَ أَن تَسْجُدَ لِمَا خَلَقْتُ بِيَدَىَّ أَسْتَكْبَرْتَ أَمْ كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلْعَالِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "O Iblees, what prevented you from prostrating to that which I created with My hands? Were you arrogant [then], or were you [already] among the haughty?"

ayahArabic: قَالَ يٰٓإِبْلِيسُ مَا مَنَعَكَ أَن تَسْجُدَ لِمَا خَلَقْتُ بِيَدَىَّ أَسْتَكْبَرْتَ أَمْ كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلْعَالِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "O Iblees, what prevented you from prostrating to that which I created with My hands? Were you arrogant [then], or were you [already] among the haughty?"

targetTranslation: that you bow down in worship (to مَا)
ayahArabic: قَالَ يٰٓإِبْلِيسُ مَا مَنَعَكَ أَن تَسْجُدَ لِمَا خَلَقْتُ بِيَدَىَّ أَسْتَكْبَرْتَ أَمْ كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلْعَالِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "O Iblees, what prevented you from prostrating to that which I created with My hands? Were you arrogant [then], or were you [already] among the haughty?"

ayahArabic: قَالَ يٰٓإِبْلِيسُ مَا مَنَعَكَ أَن تَسْجُدَ لِمَا خَلَقْتُ بِيَدَىَّ أَسْتَكْبَرْتَ أَمْ كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلْعَالِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "O Iblees, what prevented you from prostrating to that which I created with My hands? Were you arrogant [then], or were you [already] among the haughty?"

ayahArabic: قَالَ يٰٓإِبْلِيسُ مَا مَنَعَكَ أَن تَسْجُدَ لِمَا خَلَقْتُ بِيَدَىَّ أَسْتَكْبَرْتَ أَمْ كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلْعَالِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "O Iblees, what prevented you from prostrating to that which I created with My hands? Were you arrogant [then], or were you [already] among the haughty?"

targetTranslation: you were (addressing Iblis in response to his refusal to prostrate)
ayahArabic: قَالَ يٰٓإِبْلِيسُ مَا مَنَعَكَ أَن تَسْجُدَ لِمَا خَلَقْتُ بِيَدَىَّ أَسْتَكْبَرْتَ أَمْ كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلْعَالِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "O Iblees, what prevented you from prostrating to that which I created with My hands? Were you arrogant [then], or were you [already] among the haughty?"

targetTranslation: he said (introducing what Iblis/Satan says next)
ayahArabic: قَالَ أَنَا۠ خَيْرٌ مِّنْهُ خَلَقْتَنِى مِن نَّارٍ وَخَلَقْتَهُۥ مِن طِينٍ
ayahEnglish: He said, "I am better than him. You created me from fire and created him from clay."

ayahArabic: قَالَ أَنَا۠ خَيْرٌ مِّنْهُ خَلَقْتَنِى مِن نَّارٍ وَخَلَقْتَهُۥ مِن طِينٍ
ayahEnglish: He said, "I am better than him. You created me from fire and created him from clay."

ayahArabic: قَالَ أَنَا۠ خَيْرٌ مِّنْهُ خَلَقْتَنِى مِن نَّارٍ وَخَلَقْتَهُۥ مِن طِينٍ
ayahEnglish: He said, "I am better than him. You created me from fire and created him from clay."

targetTranslation: you created me (said by Iblis to Allah)
ayahArabic: قَالَ أَنَا۠ خَيْرٌ مِّنْهُ خَلَقْتَنِى مِن نَّارٍ وَخَلَقْتَهُۥ مِن طِينٍ
ayahEnglish: He said, "I am better than him. You created me from fire and created him from clay."

ayahArabic: قَالَ أَنَا۠ خَيْرٌ مِّنْهُ خَلَقْتَنِى مِن نَّارٍ وَخَلَقْتَهُۥ مِن طِينٍ
ayahEnglish: He said, "I am better than him. You created me from fire and created him from clay."

ayahArabic: قَالَ أَنَا۠ خَيْرٌ مِّنْهُ خَلَقْتَنِى مِن نَّارٍ وَخَلَقْتَهُۥ مِن طِينٍ
ayahEnglish: He said, "I am better than him. You created me from fire and created him from clay."

ayahArabic: قَالَ فَٱخْرُجْ مِنْهَا فَإِنَّكَ رَجِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "Then get out of it [i.e., Paradise], for indeed, you are expelled.

targetTranslation: an outcast/one who is driven away
ayahArabic: قَالَ فَٱخْرُجْ مِنْهَا فَإِنَّكَ رَجِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "Then get out of it [i.e., Paradise], for indeed, you are expelled.

ayahArabic: وَإِنَّ عَلَيْكَ لَعْنَتِىٓ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ ٱلدِّينِ
ayahEnglish: And indeed, upon you is My curse until the Day of Recompense."

ayahArabic: وَإِنَّ عَلَيْكَ لَعْنَتِىٓ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ ٱلدِّينِ
ayahEnglish: And indeed, upon you is My curse until the Day of Recompense."

ayahArabic: قَالَ رَبِّ فَأَنظِرْنِىٓ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ يُبْعَثُونَ
ayahEnglish: He said, "My Lord, then reprieve me until the Day they are resurrected."

ayahArabic: قَالَ رَبِّ فَأَنظِرْنِىٓ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ يُبْعَثُونَ
ayahEnglish: He said, "My Lord, then reprieve me until the Day they are resurrected."

ayahArabic: قَالَ رَبِّ فَأَنظِرْنِىٓ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ يُبْعَثُونَ
ayahEnglish: He said, "My Lord, then reprieve me until the Day they are resurrected."

ayahArabic: قَالَ رَبِّ فَأَنظِرْنِىٓ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ يُبْعَثُونَ
ayahEnglish: He said, "My Lord, then reprieve me until the Day they are resurrected."

ayahArabic: قَالَ فَإِنَّكَ مِنَ ٱلْمُنظَرِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "So indeed, you are of those reprieved

ayahArabic: إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ ٱلْوَقْتِ ٱلْمَعْلُومِ
ayahEnglish: Until the Day of the time well-known."

targetTranslation: he said (followed by فَبِعِزَّتِكَ - 'so by Your might')
ayahArabic: قَالَ فَبِعِزَّتِكَ لَأُغْوِيَنَّهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Iblees] said, "By Your might, I will surely mislead them all.

targetTranslation: all together (as objects of لَأُغْوِيَنَّهُمْ - I will mislead them)
ayahArabic: قَالَ فَبِعِزَّتِكَ لَأُغْوِيَنَّهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Iblees] said, "By Your might, I will surely mislead them all.

ayahArabic: إِلَّا عِبَادَكَ مِنْهُمُ ٱلْمُخْلَصِينَ
ayahEnglish: Except, among them, Your chosen servants."

ayahArabic: قَالَ فَٱلْحَقُّ وَٱلْحَقَّ أَقُولُ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "The truth [is My oath], and the truth I say -

ayahArabic: قَالَ فَٱلْحَقُّ وَٱلْحَقَّ أَقُولُ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "The truth [is My oath], and the truth I say -

targetTranslation: Hell (object of لَأَمْلَأَنَّ - I will surely fill)
ayahArabic: لَأَمْلَأَنَّ جَهَنَّمَ مِنكَ وَمِمَّن تَبِعَكَ مِنْهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
ayahEnglish: [That] I will surely fill Hell with you and those of them that follow you all together."

targetTranslation: he followed you (referring to the one being addressed in this statement)
ayahArabic: لَأَمْلَأَنَّ جَهَنَّمَ مِنكَ وَمِمَّن تَبِعَكَ مِنْهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
ayahEnglish: [That] I will surely fill Hell with you and those of them that follow you all together."

ayahArabic: لَأَمْلَأَنَّ جَهَنَّمَ مِنكَ وَمِمَّن تَبِعَكَ مِنْهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
ayahEnglish: [That] I will surely fill Hell with you and those of them that follow you all together."

ayahArabic: قُلْ مَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ وَمَآ أَنَا۠ مِنَ ٱلْمُتَكَلِّفِينَ
ayahEnglish: Say, [O Muḥammad], "I do not ask you for it [i.e., the Qur’ān] any payment, and I am not of the pretentious.

targetTranslation: I ask you all (object of قُلْ - say)
ayahArabic: قُلْ مَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ وَمَآ أَنَا۠ مِنَ ٱلْمُتَكَلِّفِينَ
ayahEnglish: Say, [O Muḥammad], "I do not ask you for it [i.e., the Qur’ān] any payment, and I am not of the pretentious.

ayahArabic: قُلْ مَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ وَمَآ أَنَا۠ مِنَ ٱلْمُتَكَلِّفِينَ
ayahEnglish: Say, [O Muḥammad], "I do not ask you for it [i.e., the Qur’ān] any payment, and I am not of the pretentious.

ayahArabic: قُلْ مَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ وَمَآ أَنَا۠ مِنَ ٱلْمُتَكَلِّفِينَ
ayahEnglish: Say, [O Muḥammad], "I do not ask you for it [i.e., the Qur’ān] any payment, and I am not of the pretentious.

targetTranslation: he/it (referring to the Quran in this ayah)
ayahArabic: إِنْ هُوَ إِلَّا ذِكْرٌ لِّلْعٰلَمِينَ
ayahEnglish: It is but a reminder to the worlds.

ayahArabic: إِنْ هُوَ إِلَّا ذِكْرٌ لِّلْعٰلَمِينَ
ayahEnglish: It is but a reminder to the worlds.

ayahArabic: وَلَتَعْلَمُنَّ نَبَأَهُۥ بَعْدَ حِينٍۭ
ayahEnglish: And you will surely know [the truth of] its information after a time."

ayahArabic: وَلَتَعْلَمُنَّ نَبَأَهُۥ بَعْدَ حِينٍۭ
ayahEnglish: And you will surely know [the truth of] its information after a time."

ayahArabic: وَلَتَعْلَمُنَّ نَبَأَهُۥ بَعْدَ حِينٍۭ
ayahEnglish: And you will surely know [the truth of] its information after a time."
